SEARCH
Package model

Class ServicePoint

java.lang.Object
model.ServicePoint
public class ServicePoint extends Object
Represents a service station in the simulation, including its parallel service stations, routing odds, service timing, utilization, and completed-customer metrics.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ServicePoint(Simulation _simulation, int _serviceTime, int[][] _branchOdds)
    Creates a service point with a base service duration and routing table.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    endService()
    Finishes the current service, records utilization, and routes or completes the customer.
    int
    getActiveTime()
    Gets this point's accumulated active serving time.
    int
    getArrived()
    Gets the number of customers that have started service here.
    int
    getCompletedCustomerCount()
    Gets the completed customer count used in average-service-time calculations.
    int
    getCompletedServingTime()
    Gets completed serving time used in average-service-time calculations.
    int
    getCustomersInSystem()
    Gets the number of customers currently associated with this service point.
    List<ServicePoint>
    getParallels()
    Gets this service point's parallel alternatives.
    int
    getServed()
    Gets the number of customers that have completed service here.
    int[][]
    getServiceCount()
    Gets the cumulative routing table for this service point.
    int
    getSPId()
    Gets the service-point identifier.
    int
    getTotalTime()
    Gets the elapsed simulation time since this point was created.

    Reports whether this service point can accept a customer at the current simulation time.

    Checks availability at a specific simulation time.

    Checks whether this service point is currently busy.

    processBEvent(Event event)
    Processes a phase-B event for this service point.
    boolean

    Reserves this service point for the full duration of a future service.
    void
    setFourth()
    Marks this service point as the shared tier-four terminal service point.

    Creates parallel service points that share this point's identifier and routing behavior.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ServicePoint

      public ServicePoint(Simulation _simulation, int _serviceTime, int[][] _branchOdds)
      Creates a service point with a base service duration and routing table.
      Parameters:
      _simulation - owning simulation
      _serviceTime - base service duration in simulation minutes
      _branchOdds - cumulative routing odds, where each row is [threshold, childIndex]

  • Method Details

    • setParallels

      public void setParallels(int quantity)
      Creates parallel service points that share this point's identifier and routing behavior.
      Parameters:
      quantity - number of parallel service points to create

    • getParallels

      public List<ServicePoint> getParallels()
      Gets this service point's parallel alternatives.
      Returns:
      mutable list of parallel service points

    • setFourth

      public void setFourth()
      Marks this service point as the shared tier-four terminal service point.

    • getSPId

      public int getSPId()
      Gets the service-point identifier.
      Returns:
      identifier shared by this point and its parallels

    • isBusy

      public boolean isBusy()
      Checks whether this service point is currently busy.
      Returns:
      true when a customer is being served

    • processBEvent

      public void processBEvent(Event event)
      Processes a phase-B event for this service point.
      Parameters:
      event - start-service or end-service event to apply

    • endService

      public void endService()
      Finishes the current service, records utilization, and routes or completes the customer.

    • isActive

      public int isActive()
      Reports whether this service point can accept a customer at the current simulation time.
      Returns:
      0 when active and available; -1 when unavailable

    • isAvailableAt

      public boolean isAvailableAt(int time)
      Checks availability at a specific simulation time.
      Parameters:
      time - simulation time to inspect
      Returns:
      true when not busy and not already reserved for that time

    • reserveTime

      public boolean reserveTime(int time)
      Reserves this service point for the full duration of a future service.
      Parameters:
      time - start time to reserve
      Returns:
      true when the reservation succeeded; otherwise false

    • getArrived

      public int getArrived()
      Gets the number of customers that have started service here.
      Returns:
      arrived customer count

    • getServed

      public int getServed()
      Gets the number of customers that have completed service here.
      Returns:
      served customer count

    • getTotalTime

      public int getTotalTime()
      Gets the elapsed simulation time since this point was created.
      Returns:
      total lifetime in simulation minutes

    • getActiveTime

      public int getActiveTime()
      Gets this point's accumulated active serving time.
      Returns:
      active service time in simulation minutes

    • getCustomersInSystem

      public int getCustomersInSystem()
      Gets the number of customers currently associated with this service point.
      Returns:
      arrived customers minus served customers

    • getCompletedServingTime

      public int getCompletedServingTime()
      Gets completed serving time used in average-service-time calculations.
      Returns:
      accumulated completed serving time

    • getCompletedCustomerCount

      public int getCompletedCustomerCount()
      Gets the completed customer count used in average-service-time calculations.
      Returns:
      number of completed services

    • getServiceCount

      public int[][] getServiceCount()
      Gets the cumulative routing table for this service point.
      Returns:
      branch odds as rows of [threshold, childIndex]
